warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A master of weapons and armor, the warrior excels at absorbing punishment and dealing it in equal measure.

paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.description: A holy warrior who combines martial strength with divine magic.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: A tracker and marksman equally at home in melee or at range.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A nimble combatant who overwhelms enemies with rapid strikes and cunning.

priest.name: Priest
priest.description: A conduit of holy and shadow power, capable of sustaining allies or sapping enemies.

shaman.name: Shaman
shaman.description: A spiritual conduit who channels the elements through weapon and spell alike.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: A master of arcane, fire, and frost magic.

warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.description: A wielder of fel and shadow magic who draws power from demons and curses.

druid.name: Druid
druid.description: A shapeshifter who draws power from nature to fill any role the party needs.
